repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md §1 panel entries are linear/FWL history-cell decompositions, not PPML sign-region computation

published_prior_art.cite: Collins1975CAD gives a terminating cylindrical-algebraic-decomposition/real-quantifier-elimination procedure, including sign-invariant cells, sample points, and complexity bounds for exactly the rational polynomial system obtained after the proposed exponential reparameterization

Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD §3 derives fixed-T pooled canonical-link QMLE, the joint covariance of cohort-time effects, and analytical/delta-method standard errors for their aggregations; MoreauKastler2025PTT eq. (3.14) supplies this smooth counterfactual-share ratio and uses a unit bootstrap

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The requested termination-certified semialgebraic partition is a direct instance of Collins1975CAD after the handle itself prescribes polynomialization and quantifier elimination; it contributes no PPML-specific mathematical frontier.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The proposal omits the decisive real-algebraic-geometry comparator, Collins1975CAD, whose generic CAD theorem subsumes the claimed algorithmic result.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question 2
novelty_flags.one_line: Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD already supplies the pooled Poisson-QMLE and analytic delta-method machinery for fixed-T cohort-time aggregations, while MoreauKastler2025PTT defines the proposed smooth ratio; spelling out its sandwich influence function is a routine composition, not a new inference regime.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The expansion is centered at PTT_N, a P_N finite-panel functional, but its assumptions and estimator are defined under iid law P without any premise linking P_N to P or defining the corresponding PTT(P).

soundness_flags.label: ass:interacted-mean-correctness / Open-ended Question 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Mean correctness is imposed only on treated coordinates C, although the cohort-time QMLE uses all observations and needs a P-level baseline restriction on untreated and pre-treatment cells for bhat_gt to estimate b_gt.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the generic CAD exercise with an explicit, nondegenerate multicohort PPML family and a new closed-form or efficiently computable sign threshold that establishes a generic obstruction beyond Moreau-Kastler’s example.

Either drop the ratio-inference question as a delta-method corollary or move to a genuinely new regime, such as uniform/many-cohort inference or an efficiency result with an attaining estimator, against Wooldridge’s pooled-QMLE theory.
If retaining inference, define PTT(P), link P_N to the iid sequence, and impose the multiplicative untreated mean model over every cohort-time coordinate used by the QMLE.

recommended_next_step: Pivot: both current kernels are subsumed by established general CAD or fixed-T Poisson-QMLE/delta-method machinery, so a field-level proposal requires a new substantive PPML frontier or inference regime.
